chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT LARKANA C.P.No.D-685 of 2023 C.P.No.D-724 of 2023 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objections at flag "A". 2. For hearing of main case. ------ 21.05.2025 Mr. Abdul Rehman A. Bhutto, Advocate for the Petitioner in C.P.No.D-685 of 2023. Mr. Liaquat Ali Shar, Additional Advocate General, Sindh a/w Zaheer Abbas Mir, Deputy Secretary, Health Department, Karachi Dr. Capt. Nasrullah Soomro, Director, Health Services, Larkana, Dr. Syed Aijaz Ali Shah, D.H.O. Kashmore and Syed Ali Raza Shah, Assistant Commissioner, Kandhkot. ------ The officers, present in the Court, file parawise comments alongwith compliance report, taken on record. They have further submitted that the Medical Officers have been posted at Government Medical Dispensary Saifuddin Jakhrani, Taluka Kashmore at Kandhkot; however, they ensure their continuity with regard to the performance of duty. When confronted, counsel for the petitioner being satisfied seeks disposal of the petition. Subject to all legal exceptions as well as compliance in terms of the undertaking submitted by the officers, present today, these petitions are hereby disposed of. A copy of this order shall be sent through fax to Secretary to the Government of Sindh, Health Department, Karachi as well as D.H.O, Kashmore- Kandhkot for compliance. Copy be also provided to the office of the Additional Advocate General, Sindh for correspondence and compliance. Judge Judge Manzoor
